review_text: The most loved app by me. I want to request that you introduce basket orders as well. I am very happy that you all introduced trailing stop loss as per request. please introduce basket order as well

On the listing day, the stock was not visible on the Groww app for around 10 minutes after it went live on the exchange. During the same time, it was available for trading on other brokerage platforms. This delay prevented me from entering at my intended price. For active traders, even a few minutes matter. I hope necessary improvements are made to avoid such delays in future listings.

I find the Groww app simple and easy to use. The interface is clean and straightforward, which makes it good for beginners who are just starting with investing or mutual funds. Navigating between stocks, mutual funds, and other investment options is smooth, and basic data like price charts and performance history loads quickly.

Many things have improved and are working fine. But then I saw the loans tab in the app and GR1 AI wrapper in the web. Why? just why! U can make a separate application for loans, upi and ai things. Please don't make ur clean interface bloated with these things.

Moderate to good app. good for long term holding. bad for intraday trading / margin trading. they are still the slower than the big competitors (like big banks). I would have given 5 stars if there was an option to increase the font size in the app. it should be customisable. the fonts are for ants, not for human eyes.

All the basic features are useful. The one thing I miss is the custom portfolio split for mutual funds similar to stocks. I want to categorise and see how my funds are performing. If this is added then it's a wholesome package. This would allow me to bring all my funds into groww and use this as my only investment app.

Your app is great! I’d like to suggest a small improvement: while reviewing GTT orders, the current market price is only visible after selecting the script and opening the popup. It would be very helpful if the market price could be displayed directly in the GTT order window, making it easier to review and quickly edit GTT orders.

This is the finest app I have invested in. I have a few suggestions, if possible, to implement: I see notifications on the app icon, but when I click on them, they do not direct me to the intended notification. Is there a possibility of adding a "Notification Center" page so we can easily view all notifications in one place? A centralized "Portfolio" page where all our investments can be viewed at a single glance, instead of going to each individual tab (Stocks, F&O, Mutual Funds).

I took trade using pledged amount. It charged 450 to pledge the amount of 45000. I am in a trade but still showing the -7600 cash don't know why if I'm in a trade. Without exiting the trade I added 7700 more amount. After 5 days I booked 5076 profit. But in my cash wallet it is showing 10300 amount. After customer service. 7700+5035 = 12735 - 1000 brokerage = 11735 - 450 = 11285 should show. But it is showing 10300, Grow is worst platform for options, I also found mutual fund withdraw fraud.

I had a very pathetic experience with Groww. Their stop-loss and target features did not work properly. I would strongly advise others not to trade with Groww based on my experience. If you are in profit and have set a 30-point target, even after the market touches that price (or comes very close, around 10 points away), the system exits the trade early. However, when you are in a loss, the stop-loss works correctly

very terrible experience for intra day trading if you try to exit from trading at market price they make sure you always get way lower than market price. If market price if 40.09 still they trigger the stoploss which is 40.25

they are silent partners in your every trade, calculations mostly incorrect and sometimes they deduct money. if you sell your holdings they also take profit from your every single trade whether it's intraday or delivery. worst customer support and chat support. I sell HCC 1007 shares in which 307 are reshares at discounted price of 12.50 and I sold them on at the price of 20.8 they even didn't give the principle amount I invested in re-shares and the remaining profit is out of universe. madarchd

Terrible experience. Placed a Sensex Call order, but the app glitched and didn't even show the order in my dashboard. I tried to cancel immediately, but the app was unresponsive. It finally 'ghost executed' my order at a much higher price (₹291) when the market had already crashed to ₹256. I have a full screen recording of the app failing to cancel and hiding my active positions. If you value your capital, stay away. I am filing a formal complaint with SEBI SCORES.

Yesterday, I installed the Groww app and began intraday trading. After buying stocks, I tried to exit my positions but faced an issue with the app. I called customer support and waited about 10 minutes. After a 43 Minute call, she was told that I needed to use a laptop to exit. I realised I would have been in a tough spot if I hadn’t had a laptop available. I also worry about what might have happened if I had invested a larger amount and faced a bigger loss while using the app.
